data.title: Green Beret and SWAT Officer Trevor Thrasher launches self-security program for corporate leaders in 2025.
data.description: Executive Masterclass Equips Business Professionals with Tools for Personal Safety, Family Protection, and Crisis Leadership in Omaha, Nebraska on July 25, 2025. With an increase in workplace violence and urban crime, executives are being targeted more frequently. Participants will learn essential skills to ensure their safety and that of their families while also developing crisis management abilities.

data.title: Blue Hat (BHAT) reports strong gold market growth with institutional capital inflows, global ETFs seeing net inflows, and central banks purchasing over 1,000 tons annually for four years.
data.description: Hong Kong, July 25, 2025: Recent trends indicate a strong upward cycle in the gold market, attributed to both technical and fundamental factors. As of mid-July 2025, key technical indicators have displayed positive signals. Institutional capital has been consistently entering the gold market, evidenced by substantial net inflows into global gold ETFs in the first half of the year. Central banks worldwide have maintained purchases exceeding 1,000 tons for the fourth consecutive year. NASDAQ-listed Blue Hat (BHAT) has released reports on the performance of its gold holdings obtained through its precious metals trading strategy, reflecting the current market scenario.

data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Hangzhou, China, a city with a rich history spanning over 5,000 years, has emerged as a key platform for showcasing China's cultural heritage globally. data.title: Shipley Donuts achieves 18th straight quarter of sales growth, expands to 14th state; largest brand with record growth.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, Shipley Donuts, the leading brand in fresh, daily-made donuts and kolaches, made a significant expansion into its 14th state. The company, based in Houston, continued its impressive growth trajectory by achieving positive sales growth for the 18th consecutive quarter. This expansion highlights the brand's success and popularity, cementing its position as the nation's largest donut and kolache provider.

data.title: Global Virtual, Augmented, Mixed Reality Market report 2026-2036 by ResearchAndMarkets.com profiles 180+ leading companies across XR ecosystem.
data.description: A recent report titled "The Global Virtual, Augmented and Mixed Reality Market 2026-2036" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report provides an in-depth analysis of the global virtual, augmented, and mixed reality market, covering the period from 2026 to 2036. It offers valuable insights into the evolving extended reality ecosystem, encompassing market dynamics, technological advancements, and strategic opportunities that are influencing the future of spatial computing. This authoritative report spans 487 pages, presenting a comprehensive view of the landscape.

data.title: Trump visited Fed to discuss renovation costs, but Powell refused to engage.
data.description: The President confronted Jerome Powell, the Federal Reserve Chair, regarding the expenses for renovating the central bank's headquarters. However, Powell refused to engage in the discussion.

data.title: TriNet reported Q2 revenues of $1.2B, with a net income of $37M. Lower earnings compared to last year. Adjusted EBITDA was $105M. Number of average WSEs decreased 4% to 336K. Reaffirms full-year 2025 guidance. CEO highlighted strategy execution and customer support during volatile times.
data.description: TriNet Group, Inc. announced its financial results for the second quarter of 2025. Total revenues were $1.2 billion, with professional service revenues decreasing by 8% to $172 million. Net income was $37 million, Adjusted Net Income was $55 million, and Adjusted EBITDA was $105 million. Average WSEs decreased by 4% to approximately 336,000. The company returned $117 million to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends in the first half of 2025. TriNet reiterated its full-year 2025 guidance, with key figures including Total Revenues between $4,950 and $5,140 million, and Adjusted EBITDA Margin between 7% and 9%. TriNet will host an earnings conference call and webcast to discuss the results and guidance. For more details, the original news article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nucor Corp. expected to report $2.70/share earnings, $8.48 billion revenue in Q2, offers 1.56% annual dividend yield.
data.description: Nucor Corporation (NYSE: NUE) is set to announce its second-quarter earnings after market close on Monday, July 28. Analysts are predicting earnings of $2.70 per share, up from $2.68 per share in the same period last year. The company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $8.48 billion, a significant increase from the $8.08 billion reported in the corresponding quarter a year ago. Nucor is drawing attention from investors due to its attractive dividend offer - an annual dividend yield of 1.56%, with a semi-annual dividend payout of 54 cents per share ($2.20 per year). Investors looking to make $500 regularly from the dividend yield can explore opportunities with Nucor.
